---
name: ✨ Feature Request
description: Suggest an idea for this mod
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Feature Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like -->

## Problem Statement
<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Why is it needed? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe how you envision this feature working -->

## Alternative Solutions
<!-- Have you considered any alternative solutions or features? -->

## Use Cases
<!-- Who would use this feature and how would they use it? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context, screenshots, or mockups about the feature request here -->

## Implementation Ideas
<!-- If you have any technical ideas about how to implement this, share them here -->

## Related Issues
<!-- Does this relate to any existing issues or features? -->
